requirement_topic.en: MEKH / MAVIR Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Hungarian Network
requirement_topic.zh: MEKH/MAVIR并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz匈牙利电网
requirement_topic.zht: MEKH/MAVIR併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz匈牙利電網

summary.en: Hungary's electricity supply network is operated by regional DSOs under MEKH (Magyar Energetikai és Közmű-szabályozási Hivatal) regulatory oversight, with MAVIR as the transmission system operator. The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected EV charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation. Large fast-charging deployments above defined capacity thresholds may require MEKH energy-sector licensing. Grid-connection applications and technical documentation must be submitted in Hungarian.
summary.zh: 匈牙利电力供应网络由各区域配电系统运营商在MEKH（Magyar Energetikai és Közmű-szabályozási Hivatal）监管下运营，MAVIR为输电系统运营商。低压电网环境为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成配电系统运营商供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。超过规定容量阈值的大型快充部署可能需要取得MEKH能源行业许可。并网申请及技术文件须以匈牙利语提交。
summary.zht: 匈牙利電力供應網絡由各區域配電系統運營商在MEKH（Magyar Energetikai és Közmű-szabályozási Hivatal）監管下運營，MAVIR為輸電系統運營商。低壓電網環境為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成配電系統運營商供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、調試及書面項目驗收。超過規定容量閾值的大型快充部署可能需要取得MEKH能源行業許可。併網申請及技術文件須以匈牙利語提交。

standards_or_laws: MEKH (Hungarian Energy and Public Utility Regulatory Authority) electricity-sector regulatory framework
Regional DSO grid-connection and project-acceptance requirements (Hungary)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
Hungary low-voltage grid — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Hungary 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline. Chinese grid-operator acceptance certificates are not valid for Hungarian DSO or MEKH project review.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：匈牙利230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。中国电网运营商验收证书对匈牙利配电系统运营商或MEKH项目审查无效。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：匈牙利230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。中國電網運營商驗收證書對匈牙利配電系統運營商或MEKH項目審查無效。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices (Type B RCD or equivalent per IEC 60364-7-722), metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for Hungarian DSO review. Large fast-charging installations (typically above 50 kW or multiple-unit sites) may require MEKH energy-sector licensing. All grid-connection applications, technical documentation, and commissioning records must be in Hungarian. Hungary's continental climate (temperature range -20°C to +40°C) should be reflected in charger environmental ratings.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件（依据IEC 60364-7-722的B型RCD或等效装置）、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按匈牙利配电系统运营商审查准备。大型快充安装（通常超过50 kW或多机组场址）可能需要取得MEKH能源行业许可。所有并网申请、技术文件和调试记录须以匈牙利语提交。匈牙利大陆性气候（温度范围-20°C至+40°C）应体现在充电设备的环境额定值中。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件（依據IEC 60364-7-722的B型RCD或等效裝置）、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按匈牙利配電系統運營商審查準備。大型快充安裝（通常超過50 kW或多機組場址）可能需要取得MEKH能源行業許可。所有併網申請、技術文件和調試記錄須以匈牙利語提交。匈牙利大陸性氣候（溫度範圍-20°C至+40°C）應體現在充電設備的環境額定值中。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected EV charger installations require Hungarian DSO project review and acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency; large installations may require MEKH licensing; all submissions must be in Hungarian
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Hungarian DSO or MEKH approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Hungary 230/400 V

source.publisher: Hungarian Energy and Public Utility Regulatory Authority (MEKH)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Hungary-ready EVSE needs Hungarian DSO project acceptance, explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation, and for large installations, MEKH energy-sector licensing. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. All grid-connection applications and technical documentation must be submitted in Hungarian.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向匈牙利的EVSE需要匈牙利配电系统运营商项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz，大型安装还须取得MEKH能源行业许可。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。所有并网申请及技术文件须以匈牙利语提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向匈牙利的EVSE需要匈牙利配電系統運營商項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz，大型安裝還須取得MEKH能源行業許可。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。所有併網申請及技術文件須以匈牙利語提交。
